main.summary: Defines execution mode configuration for a Command.

property.name: AllowAsynchronous
property.summary: True if asynchronous execution is permitted.

property.name: AllowFreeMode
property.summary: True if commands may run in free mode (tool does not await completion or set the ActivityRecord).

property.name: AllowSynchronous
property.summary: True if synchronous execution is permitted.

field.name: Locked
field.summary: True if the execution model is locked and cannot be changed.

method.name: Configure
method.summary: Configure synchronous, asynchronous, and free mode capabilities.
method.param: True to allow free mode execution.
method.returns: True if the configuration was applied; false if locked or invalid.

method.name: AllowBoth
method.summary: Allow both synchronous and asynchronous execution.

method.name: AllowBothFreeMode
method.summary: Allow synchronous and asynchronous execution, with support for free mode.

method.name: AllowAll
method.summary: Allow all execution modes. Equivalent to .

method.name: AllowAsynchronousFreeMode
method.summary: Allow only asynchronous execution, with support for free mode.

method.name: Lock
method.summary: Lock the execution model to prevent further changes.
